description: Continuously mirrors data from an external database (Azure SQL, Cosmos DB, Snowflake, PostgreSQL) into Fabric. Provides near real-time replication without ETL pipelines. Mirrored data is queryable via SQL endpoint.

definition_parts.description: Mirroring configuration with source database connection and table mappings

notes: Create uses type-specific endpoint POST /mirroredDatabases (not generic /items)
Start/stop mirroring: POST .../startMirroring and .../stopMirroring with empty body {}
Status endpoints use GET (not POST): GET .../getMirroringStatus
